codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly addresses both prior findings from email-template-redesign. Day-of reminder now includes a timezone-formatted Date row in HTML and a Date line in plain text, and both email templates now format non-free prices with two decimal places via toFixed(2). No remaining blocking or non-blocking issues were found in scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation contract language for day-of reminder details still omits date even though feature specs and implemented behavior require date, which can cause future implementation/review drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:97-99 (VAL-EMAIL-004 lists time/venue/address/price only) vs features.json email-template-redesign expectedBehavior (requires full details including date in both templates).

summary: Fix review passed. The original blocking gap (missing day-of date in HTML/text) is resolved, and the prior price-formatting concern is resolved in both templates.
